title: Shinjis friendship with Kaworu
wikitext:
[]: Shinji's friendship with Kaworu             Quote Post by Polker11 » Fri Aug 19, 2011 5:13 am I find this an interesting topic. Shinji becomes friends with Kaworu the day he meets him. You could argue that it's because of Kaworu's sincere "I love you," or because Shinji is so distant from everyone else. The problem I have with this is the fact that if you have three people betray your trust your not going to cling to the next person who offers you a shoulder to cry on you would push them further away to avoid betrayal (and he did betray him). Also if someone said I love you after you meet them that's pretty weird. In the manga Kaworu and Shinji aren't really friends (in Shinji's defense he did strangle a cat) buit this seems more logical then the original tv series instant BFF reaction.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Fri Aug 19, 2011 10:27 am The thing is, Shinji requires unconditional love and the only person who offers it to him is Kaworu. Shinji is so desperate for positive social interaction by this point in the story (remember by '24 he has NO ONE to talk to) that he's willing become BFFs with some random guy on the off chance it goes somewhere. His relationship with Kaworu is in many ways, his last hope, and the fallout from that relationship is why he's such and empty shell in EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by Polker11 » Fri Aug 19, 2011 10:44 am I suppose that Shinji also sees Kawuro as an Angelic figure which is exactly what he is which could be some of the attraction. The thing I really don't like about this is that Shinji has lived most of his life alone (lonely) so by now he'd be used to it. You could argue that Shinji has made friends and thus does not want to go back to being alone, but I don't think that's the reason On another note, I never really understood why Shinji doesn't trust or doesn't like being around Misato, I can obviously get Rei and he ends up confiding in Asuka but I never understood why he hates Misato at the end (maybe it's because it's been some time since I watched the series last).[/code]

[]: Pretty Straight Forward B/             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Fri Aug 19, 2011 11:53 am Polker11 wrote: On another note, I never really understood why Shinji doesn't trust or doesn't like being around Misato, I can obviously get Rei and he ends up confiding in Asuka but I never understood why he hates Misato at the end (maybe it's because it's been some time since I watched the series last).[/code]

[]: Re: Pretty Straight Forward B/             Quote Post by Light » Fri Aug 19, 2011 12:21 pm Alaska Slim wrote: She tried to rape him . He's also in guilt over not being able/willling to comfort her after Kaji died.

[]: Re: Pretty Straight Forward B/ - Bl             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Fri Aug 19, 2011 1:11 pm Light wrote: How does that pass for a rape attempt?

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Fri Aug 19, 2011 1:35 pm While I agree that Shinji is desperate for positive interaction, I'm not sure he needs unconditional love, but that is what Kaworu gives. Think of it like a giving a 5 course meal to Oliver Twist.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Fri Aug 19, 2011 3:06 pm Exactly. There's no way Shinji could possible refuse Kaworu's offer of friendship because by refusing he admits he doesn't want anyone's love, which of course, he does.

[]:             Quote Post by Polker11 » Fri Aug 19, 2011 9:37 pm I definitely do not remember Misato supposedly raping Shinji but like I said I haven't watched the series in ages (I do remember her offering him sex in EoE, but that could just be another english dub mistranslation). However with the relationship with Kaworu (looking back) I can see that even after Shinji killed Kaworu he was defending him when he was talking to Misato, saying "Kaworu should've survived, not me, Kaworu was a much better person" (or along those lines). This shows that Shinji never acknowledged that Kaworu was an Angel, the same thing that he had been fighting this whole time and he saw himself rather than a hero just a cold-blooded murderer. In fact in EoE when he's freaking out after seeing the giant Rei he immediately calms down and starts smiling (but that's also because of Yui). [/quote]

[]:             Quote Post by Xous » Fri Aug 19, 2011 10:23 pm Polker11 wrote: ...This shows that Shinji never acknowledged that Kaworu was an Angel, the same thing that he had been fighting this whole time and he saw himself rather than a hero just a cold-blooded murderer.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Fri Aug 19, 2011 10:44 pm Polker11 wrote: I definitely do not remember Misato supposedly raping Shinji but like I said I haven't watched the series in ages (I do remember her offering him sex in EoE, but that could just be another english dub mistranslation). However with the relationship with Kaworu (looking back) I can see that even after Shinji killed Kaworu he was defending him when he was talking to Misato, saying "Kaworu should've survived, not me, Kaworu was a much better person" (or along those lines). This shows that Shinji never acknowledged that Kaworu was an Angel, the same thing that he had been fighting this whole time and he saw himself rather than a hero just a cold-blooded murderer. In fact in EoE when he's freaking out after seeing the giant Rei he immediately calms down and starts smiling (but that's also because of Yui).

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Sat Aug 20, 2011 1:02 am Yeah, "rape" implies that Misato got a strap-on out from under her bed and dragged Shinji into the darkest areas of fan fiction... Maybe Kaworu was careless about his identity because he wanted to be caught, even at the beginning. It's also implied that he told Rei who he was in some way. None of his actions make it seem like he ever wanted to wipe out humanity.

[]:             Quote Post by Polker11 » Sat Aug 20, 2011 9:53 am Like I said I really have no memory of Misato even coming on to Shinji in the series yet alone that she tried to rape him. And the point I was making about Shinji and Kaworu was how quickly they became friends especially after two people whom he was closest to betrayed his trust (still have my doubts about Misato, but I am almost certainly wrong)

[]:             Quote Post by Viking » Sat Aug 20, 2011 10:26 am I think that, considering Shinji's situation at the point he meet Kaworu, anyone offering "love", and I don't mean sex , ( well not only sex ) will be "accepted" by Shinji at that point. Misato only needed some "phisical contact", Rei, well, is Rei and Asuka is cathatonic, not to talk about Gendo... Kaworu was Shinji's "last hope" to be loved by someone... Bye

[]: Rape... crap.... Bl             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sat Aug 20, 2011 11:59 am Polker11 wrote: I definitely do not remember Misato supposedly raping Shinji

[]:             Quote Post by Polker11 » Sat Aug 20, 2011 12:10 pm So it's more like a "I can't make you happy, but I can offer you sex" kinda deal.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sat Aug 20, 2011 12:48 pm Polker11 wrote: So it's more like a "I can't make you happy, but I can offer you sex" kinda deal.

[]:             Quote Post by Deepak » Sat Aug 20, 2011 5:28 pm Misato is probably still trying to cope after Kaji's death as well. She understands what Shinji is going through.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Sun Aug 21, 2011 1:38 am I don't think that moment would impact Shinji so deeply, though. That she sorta kinda wants to get it on isn't a revelation. She's started hitting on him the moment he moved in. "Take advantage of anything here!"

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sun Aug 21, 2011 1:58 am Warren Peace wrote: I don't think that moment would impact Shinji so deeply, though. That she sorta kinda wants to get it on isn't a revelation. She's started hitting on him the moment he moved in. "Take advantage of anything here!"
